problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
